title: BlockPixel Eating Animations
description: An unofficial addon to Jakob_zero's BlockPixel resource pack
body:
An addon to Jakob_zero's [BlockPixel](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockpixel/versions#all-versions) resource pack adding compatibility with the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod

All texture credits go to Jakob_zero
